name: pypicohsm

metadata.name: pypicohsm
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)

documentation:
# pypicohsm
Pico HSM tools for Python

## Introduction

Pico HSM firmware allows to convert a Raspberry Pico into a Hardware Security Module (HSM), to store private and secret keys, perform signing and ciphering operations, without exposing the key.

Pico HSM is compatible with PKCS-11 interface and it can be used with multiple tools, such as OpenSC or SmartCardShell 3. Nevertheless, pypicohsm is an extended interface to perform advanced operations, such as ChaChaPoly encryption, HMAC, PBHKDF2 or AES CBC, ECB, CFG, OFB and XTS, amongst others.

## Install

```
pip install pypicohsm
```

## Usage

pypicohsm can be used as a Python module (PicoHSM.py) or through command line.

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.RESET_RETRY_COUNTER
documentation: Enable or disable RESET RETRY COUNTER command

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.TRANSPORT_PIN
documentation: Enable or disable transport PIN mode

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.SESSION_PIN
documentation: Enable session PIN (clear on reset)

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.SESSION_PIN_EXPL
documentation: Enable session PIN (explicit clear)

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.PKA_REPLACEABLE
documentation: Enable or disable replacing of a PKA key

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.AUTH_PIN_PKA
documentation: Enable the combined authentication mode of user pin and public key authentication

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.Options.RRC_ONLY_RESET
documentation: If enabled RESET RETRY COUNTER only resets the error counter

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.PHYOpts.PHY_OPT_WCID
documentation: Enable or disable the use of the WCID

class_variables.name: picohsm.PicoHSM.PHYOpts.PHY_OPT_LED_DIM
documentation: Enable or disable the LED dimming
